name: taicho
description: 隊長 — a controllable multi-agent system. You're the captain; the agents are the squad.

scripts.build: bun scripts/ensure-devtools-stub.ts && bun build --compile --minify src/index.tsx --outfile dist/taicho

//overrides: A newer in-range AI-SDK patch publishes a broken transitive (@vercel/ai-tsconfig@0.0.0, unpublished -> 404), breaking `bun add`/`bun install` re-resolution. Direct AI-SDK deps are pinned exact (above); overrides pin only the TRANSITIVE @ai-sdk packages — overriding a direct dep is rejected by npm (EOVERRIDE), which npx uses to launch stdio MCP servers. Remove once upstream is fixed.
